state_schemas.slice: seven stat stages and base/current typing with provenance
item lifecycle/identity and base/current ability identity
species, roster, Transform/Illusion evidence and major status
Tera, weather, terrain, rooms, side conditions and hazards
move identity, PP/disable state and lock/commitment constraints

action_schemas.slice: legacy legal action and tactical metadata
move identity, signed stat deltas, effects, command and switch-target identity
resolved damage/range, KO, accuracy, effectiveness, provenance and immediate HP impact

checkpoint_compatibility.policy: Checkpoints are compatible only with their exact recorded feature version, ordered names and dimension.

known_limitations: No normalized own raw-stat block or combined effective-order feature in v7.
Opponent belief identities/distributions remain mostly collapsed to counts.
Transform copied moves/stats, Illusion reconciliation and global ability suppression are partial.
Switch candidates lack complete typing/stats/item/ability/moveset and resolved entry-hazard context.
Recoil/drain/heal are mostly structural booleans rather than exact numeric HP deltas.
Full future-state action consequences require simulator transition labels.
Diagnostic types_override cannot reliably replace a dual-type array with a shorter mono-type array.
No diagnostic schema is a production default.
